title: Filter charts and boards within monday doc column templates
excerpt:

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d like the ability to filter charts and boards that are placed within monday doc-column templates. This will probably need to be a filter based on a custom filtering system, but it’d be extremely useful.

For example, I have a board that lists schools in the Name column. We ran a survey from parents at each school grading their school on multiple categories. This information is spread throughout the columns. I can create charts from it, but now we are creating docs to send this information to each school.

Instead of being able to filter the chart for each school at the template level, I have to go into each document that is generated and change the filter to match the school name.

The ability to have an interchanging filter based on a column or name column for the monday doc column template would be extremely helpful.
